name: hool-cli
description: Agent-Driven SDLC — scaffold and configure HOOL for any project

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && rm -rf ./prompts ./agents ./rules ./hooks ./settings && cp -R ../hool-mini/prompts ./prompts && cp -R ../hool-mini/agents ./agents && cp -R ../hool-mini/rules ./rules && cp -R ../hool-mini/hooks ./hooks && cp -R ../hool-mini/settings ./settings
